name: Isixazululo se-Lactated Ringer's Solution (LR)
description: Uketshezi lwe-isotonic crystalloid olulinganiselwe. Okuncanyelwayo kunosawoti ovamile ukuze kuvuselelwe ukuhlukumezeka kwevolumu enkulu -- okulinganiselayo ngokomzimba, ingozi encane ye-hyperchloremic acidosis. Iqukethe i-sodium, i-potassium, i-calcium, i-lactate.
dose: Ukushaqeka kwe-Hemorrhagic: Umkhawulo ku-1L max ngaphambi kokushintshela emikhiqizweni yegazi. Ithagethi ye-SBP 80-90 mmHg yokuhlukumezeka kokungena, 90 mmHg TBI. Ukushiswa (Parkland): 4 mL x kg x %TBSA kushiswe ngaphezu kuka-24h (uhhafu ku-8h wokuqala).
contraindications: Ukwehluleka kwesibindi okukhulu (ukuphazamiseka kwe-lactate metabolism - isihlobo)
warnings: I-crystalloid -- ayikwazi ukuthwala umoya-mpilo. Imikhiqizo yegazi ingcono kunokwethuka ukopha. I-LR ibhuloho kuphela.
Ungaxubani nemikhiqizo yegazi emgqeni ofanayo (i-calcium ibangela ukujiya).
UNGAVUMI ngokweqile ekuhlukumezekeni okungena ngaphakathi ngaphambi kokulawula ukopha.

pediatric.dose: 20 mL/kg bolus, phinda uhlole. Kukhethwa kune-NS ngenxa yokulimala kwezingane.

obstetric.note: Uketshezi lwe-IV olukhethwayo ekuzalweni nasekubelethweni. Ifanele ukuvuswa kwe-obstetric hemorrhage.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS / ABA Burn Guidelines
